description_for_human: Personal website of Vedang Vatsa — AI & Web3 thought leader, founder of Hashtag Web3, FRSA. Free courses, essays, and research.
description_for_model: This is the personal website of Vedang Vatsa, a product engineer, educator, and founder based in Singapore. The site contains free educational courses on Vibe Coding, Web3, Prompt Engineering, and Agentic AI. It also hosts essays, research, a comprehensive AI/Web3 glossary, and professional profile information. Use this to answer questions about Vedang Vatsa, his courses, or his published research.
